mentioned in #6328 and #4068
In practical scenarios, it’s common to encounter unbalance requests distribution across GPUs, where some GPUs have requests while others do not. After enabling two batch overlap, GPUs with requests can still perform overlap at the prefill stage, thereby improv

2.The collective is only enabled on AMD, MI300, for fp16/bf16 inputs and when c

sglang.title: [AMD] Add silu_and_mul, gelu_and_mul, gelu_tanh_and_mul, and gelu_quick kernels for AMD GPUs
sglang.author: hubertlu-tw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR builds on the changes introduced in #4432, which leverages more optimal 128-bit vectorized kernels in sgl-kernel. In addition, it is also part of the effort of decoupling vllm dependency in SGLang.
Modifications

Added silu_and_mul, gelu_and_mul, and gelu_tanh_and_mul for AMD GPUs

vllm.title: Deduplicate Transformers backend code using inheritance
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Now that VLM support is merged and the model loading has been cleaned up a bit, the Transformers backend classes can be refactored to use inheritance, greatly reducing code duplication.
In summary, this PR:

Converts TransformersModel to a base class (TransformersBase) which:

inherits SupportsQuant

vllm.title: [P/D] Support CPU Transfer in NixlConnector
vllm.author: juncgu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds TPU support in NixlConnector (#17751) for P/D disaggregated serving.
The high-level idea is to use a buffer in host memory as the kv transfer buffer. The kv transfer buffer is registered under nixl agent (as the type of "DRAM"). The computed KV cache (full blocks) at the prefill instanc

vllm.title: [MoE] More balanced expert sharding
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, when num_experts is not divisible evenly by ep_size, the experts are distributed unevenly among ranks. Purpose
No functional change.
It is best practice to check properly for empty list if the value can be an empty list.
Also in tpu_commons when we try to trace the graph without MM inputs, this check fails and causes the graph for text-only input still tries to trace the MM code path.
